title: pulmonaria mollis subsp. mollis
intro: Pulmonaria mollis subsp. mollis, also known as Lungwort, is a low-growing, clump-forming perennial plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pulmonaria mollis subsp. mollis is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting immune function. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk remedies to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
